01222121120020100011110220210200101100002 - ASI: 27

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  02 = 0 * 2
  12 = 1 * 2
  22 = 2 * 2
  001 = 0 * 01
  002 = 0 * 02
  011 = 01 * 1
  102 = 1 * 02
  112 = 1 * 12
  212 = 2 * 12
  0122 = 01 * 22
  1022 = 102 * 2
  00002 = 00 * 002
  00011 = 00 * 011
  00201 = 002 * 01
  02102 = 02 * 102
  11022 = 1 * 1022
  001011 = 001 * 011
  212112 = 212 * 112
  0020100011 = 00201 * 00011
  0122212112 = 0122 * 212112
  1102202102 = 11022 * 02102
  00101100002 = 001011 * 00002
  01222121120020100011 = 0122212112 * 0020100011
  110220210200101100002 = 1102202102 * 00101100002
  01222121120020100011110220210200101100002 = 01222121120020100011 * 110220210200101100002
